GenAiPlannerBundle.description: AI agent that processes and formats visit notes for sales representatives

genAiPlannerBundleInstructions.description: This agent specializes in processing post-call visit notes by extracting key information, formatting content, and providing structured insights. It helps sales teams maintain accurate records and identify follow-up actions from customer interactions.

GenAiPlannerBundle.scope: Processes and formats visit notes for sales teams
